name: Apex Fuel
description: fitness supplement brand + i do 1:1 online coaching on the side. been at it ~3 yrs, sell mostly direct through IG
offerings: protein, creatine, pre-workout, usually $25-55. 1:1 coaching is $200/mo, that's the big one for me
idealCustomer: gym people / fitness enthusiasts, 20s-40s. ppl who already lift and want supplements or wanna get serious with a coach
goals: coaching signups are the priority honestly, then product sales. i'll do collabs but only if the creator's audience is actually fitness
commonSpam: soo many fake 'omg love your page wanna collab??' DMs from accounts with nothing to do with fitness. also randos trying to sell me marketing/growth services
location: online only, ship across the US
